cases.prompt: 把这本长文材料做成 ReaderLab 陪读包，保留正文，并加 AI 陪读和批注入口。
cases.reason: The user asks for a body-first ReaderLab package from longform material.

cases.prompt: 把这个 SKILL.md 做成 ReaderLab 阅读包，净化正文，提炼设计资产，并保留审计链路。
cases.reason: The user asks for a ReaderLab package from engineering/Skill material.

cases.prompt: 这个文件夹里有正文、脚本、模板和参考资料，请拆成 ReaderLab 可读包。
cases.reason: The user asks to classify a mixed source folder into a reading package.

cases.prompt: 把 docs/product-spec.md 做成 ReaderLab 阅读包，保留产品规格正文，并加 AI 陪读。
cases.reason: Conceptual product specs being read as source material should preserve the full body.

cases.prompt: 帮我用三句话总结这篇文章。
cases.reason: A short summary does not require ReaderLab package generation.

cases.prompt: 帮我把这些会议记录整理成行动项。
cases.reason: Meeting note cleanup is outside ReaderLab complex-material reading.

cases.prompt: 把这个 ReaderLab Skill 安装到 .agents/skills 里并启用。
cases.reason: Installation and activation require explicit separate approval.

cases.prompt: 用这个私有 PDF 证明 ReaderLab 已经 public external validation pass。
cases.reason: Private material cannot support public external validation.
